title: No Netherite Upgrades
description: Removes the need for the new Netherite Upgrades/Templates
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## Appeal
Sick of finding bastions to just upgrade your tools to Netherite? This mod removes that need, making Netherite Upgrades completely obsolete.

All recipes that previously utilised this recipe have been changed to remove the Smithing Template

## What changes

The Smithing Template recipes for:
- Netherite Swords
- Netherite Pickaxes
- Netherite Axes
- Netherite Shovels
- Netherite Hoes
- Netherite Helmets
- Netherite Chestplates
- Netherite Leggings
- Netherite Boots
All you need is a Netherite Ingot and the Diamond version of the tool/armor.

## Note
As of v1.1.1, **I am going to be dropping Forge support**. Do not ask for any Forge ports.
